title: Todo CRUD API
description: Build a full CRUD API for a Todos table with fields: title (required, text), done (boolean, defaults to false). POST /api/todos creates, GET /api/todos lists all, GET /api/todos/:id gets one, PUT /api/todos/:id updates, DELETE /api/todos/:id removes.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done

# Your endpoints here
